case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. VS. MS CHERYL A SLAGLE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A.
